name: codeclub
description: Token compression, dev loops, hardware-aware routing for LLM coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Compress context, generate code, route to right model.
interface.longDescription: Three composable tools for LLM coding agents: token compression (70-95% reduction), autonomous dev loops (spec → working code), and hardware-aware model routing (911× cheaper than GPT-4o).
defaultPrompt: Use codeclub for compression, dev loops, and model routing.
